bio_html: I am currently pursuing my MASc in the Department of Civil and Resources Engineering at Dalhousie University. My current research focuses on the correlation between traffic dynamics and vehicle-related runoff pollution, investigating how urban mobility directly influences surface water. Beyond my core research, my fundamental research lies in the fate, transport, and remediation of emerging contaminants, exploring the complex behavior of microplastics, PFAS, 6PPD-Q and other persistent pollutants.
